claim_freshness.green_means: Every tracked claim matches the evidence declared for that claim.

health_semantics.pass_means: Only the checks declared by that specific health or CI report passed for the observed artifact or commit.

status_semantics.done: The declared task acceptance scope is completed and evidenced; limitations and separately registered follow-ups may remain outside that scope.
status_semantics.in_progress: The declared task acceptance scope is actively being implemented or verified.
status_semantics.open: The declared task acceptance scope has not started or has no implementation evidence yet.
status_semantics.partial: A bounded core exists, but the declared task acceptance scope is not fully satisfied.

reasons: The final control plane and browser gate are runtime-verified for their bounded scopes.
Canonical review retrieval remains measured below its acceptance thresholds and default promotion is blocked.
An internal deterministic release-candidate path is locally implemented; PR/main/ruleset verification remains open and public distribution stays blocked.
The optional semantic/Torch dependency closure is not hash-locked and remains outside the candidate contract.
Transitive mutable Actions remain inside two pinned upstream reusable workflows.
